name: Architecture Decision
about: Capture or change an architectural decision
title: ""
labels: "type:architecture,status:needs-decision"
assignees: ""
---

## Decision Needed

What decision needs to be made?

## Context

What constraints, risks, or prior decisions matter?

## Options

What options are being considered?

## Proposed Direction

What direction should we take, and why?

## Consequences

What becomes easier, harder, or constrained?

## Documentation Updates

- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` updated if the decision is accepted
- [ ] `docs/development-plan.md` updated if milestones or issues change
